case_title: MARY CASASANTA VS. TABLE FOR SIX TOTAL ADVENTURES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TABLE FOR SIX TOTAL ADVENTURES PAIVA, MARC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT MARC PAIVA.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASASANTA, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TABLE FOR SIX TOTAL ADVENTURES $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $74.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $824.50, (1) THE COURT TERMINATES THE REMAINDER OF PLAINTIFF CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT; AND RELEASES DEFENDANT OF ANY FURTHER OBLIGATION TO PLAINTIFF. (2) DEFENDANT MARK PAIVA DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-15-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TABLE FOR SIX TOTAL ADVENTURES
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO MARC PAIVA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-26-2010 AT 6:30PM.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (9 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CASASANTA, MARY
(SC-100) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM RETURNED UNCLAIMED/UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASASANTA, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT PAIVA, MARC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
